mnemonics.title: Flynn's Taxonomy
mnemonics.content: **S**illy **I**diots **M**ake **D**ecisions -> **S**ISD, **I**MISD, **S**IMD, **M**IMD. (Note: This helps remember the four types, even if the order is not perfect. A better one is: **S**ingle **I**s **S**imple, **M**ultiple **I**s **M**odern -> SISD is the old sequential model, while SIMD/MIMD are modern parallel models.)

mnemonics.title: MESI Protocol States
mnemonics.content: **M**y **E**xclusive **S**hared **I**nvalid -> **M**odified (My dirty data), **E**xclusive (My clean data), **S**hared (Our clean data), **I**nvalid (No data here).
